name: Tag
description: Small removable label chip. 2 background styles (stroke/gray), a persistent active/selected state, an optional dismiss icon, and an optional sublabel (e.g. a count in parentheses).
sourceNote: Figma defined 6 rigid leading-visual 'types' (Basic/Left-Icon/Avatar/Country/Brand/Company) x 2 styles x 4 states x optional dismiss — 96 variants total, several baking in specific placeholder assets (a flag, a person avatar, a brand logo). Collapsed into one generic `leading` ReactNode slot, following the same pattern as CheckboxCard/DropdownItem/CommandMenuItem. `active` is a persistent 'selected tag' prop (not a `:active` press), matching ButtonGroup's precedent — Figma's Active variant keeps a solid border + bold text rather than a transient press effect. Figma's Hover state drops the border entirely (converges Stroke and Gray styles to the same weak-bg look) regardless of starting style, which the CSS reproduces via a plain `:hover` rule.
